ID: Group 1: Shadow AI & Usage Visibility (Detecting the Unknown)

Description: Alert when a user accesses a previously unknown AI domain/service for the first time.
Implementation (Free/Manual): Weekly review of DNS/Firewall logs (look for new domains).
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Sinaptic.AI / Cloudflare: Real-time alert on "New Application Discovered".

Description: Detect installation of unapproved browser extensions that may read screen data.
Implementation (Free/Manual): Powershell script to list extensions on endpoints monthly.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Chrome Admin: Auto-inventory of all installed extensions.

Description: Monitor usage of AI apps on corporate mobile devices (BYOD/MDM).
Implementation (Free/Manual): Survey employees; Check MDM app inventory reports.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Intune / Jamf: Report on installed AI apps (ChatGPT, Perplexity) on mobile.

Description: Monitor financial transactions to detect "Shadow" AI subscriptions on corporate cards.
Implementation (Free/Manual): Finance team reviews credit card statements for "OpenAI", "Midjourney".
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Ramp / Brex / Torii: Auto-categorization of AI spending.

Description: Detect use of non-standard protocols (e.g., FTP, SSH) to AI servers (uncommon but risky).
Implementation (Free/Manual): Firewall rules logging outbound traffic on non-80/443 ports.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Cloudflare Gateway / Zscaler: Network protocol anomaly detection.

Description: Specific logging of how Admins/C-levels use AI (they are high-value targets).
Implementation (Free/Manual): Manual review of Admin logs (if available).
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Sinaptic.AI: via predefined user settings

Description: Log every attempt to paste Personally Identifiable Information (PII) into an AI prompt.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Sinaptic.AI: Log exact timestamp, URL, and PII type (masked).

Description: Monitor and log files uploaded to AI tools (PDFs, CSVs, Images).
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Cloudflare CASB / Zscaler: Inspect file uploads in transit.

Description: Monitor for massive copy-paste events (e.g., >1000 characters) into AI interfaces.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Sinaptic.AI / Endpoint DLP: Alert on "Large Paste Event".

Description: Detect if employees are being targeted by "Jailbreak" prompts or malicious inputs.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Lakera

Description: Detect AWS keys, Stripe tokens, or Private Keys in AI prompts.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Sinaptic.AI / TruffleHog: Real-time scanning of input fields.

Description: Monitor if generated content is flagged as potential copyright infringement.
Implementation (Free/Manual): Manual check of output via Google Search.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Copyleaks: API integration to check AI text against web.
Mapping (ISO / AI Act / NIST): EU AI Act Art. 50; ISO 42001 B.5.3

Description: Detect brute-force attacks against corporate AI accounts.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Okta / Azure AD: Alert on "High Failed Login Rate".

Description: Detect login to AI tools from two distant countries within a short timeframe.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Google Workspace / Microsoft Sentinel: Native "Impossible Travel" alert.

Description: Identify AI accounts that haven't been used for 30+ days (license waste & risk).
Implementation (Free/Manual): Monthly CSV export from SaaS tools & VLOOKUP.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Vanta / Torii: Auto-report "Stale Accounts".

Description: Audit logs to confirm terminated employees actually lost access to AI tools.
Implementation (Free/Manual): Manual attempt to login as ex-employee.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Okta: "Access Revoked" log confirmation.

Description: Continuous check that MFA is actually enabled for all active users.
Implementation (Free/Manual): Weekly check of User Directory "MFA Enforced" column.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Vanta / Drata: Daily automated test "MFA is enabled".

Description: Track reported instances of AI "Hallucinations" or factual errors.
Implementation (Free/Manual): "Feedback form" for employees to report bad AI answers.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Custom App Telemetry: "Thumbs down" logging in internal AI tools.

Description: Periodic review of AI outputs for gender/racial/political bias.
Implementation (Free/Manual): Quarterly manual sampling of generated marketing images/text.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Fiddler / Arize: ML Observability platforms (for custom models).
Mapping (ISO / AI Act / NIST): EU AI Act Art. 10; NIST MEASURE-2.2

Description: Monitor API token consumption to prevent financial DoS or "Runaway AI".
Implementation (Free/Manual): Daily check of OpenAI billing dashboard.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Helicone / LangSmith: Real-time cost & token tracking.

Description: Monitor response time. Sudden slowdowns may indicate DDoS or system failure.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Datadog / New Relic: APM for AI endpoints.

Description: Log instances where AI generates hate speech, violence, or NSFW content.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Azure Content Safety / OpenAI Moderation API.

Description: Log the "Human in the Loop" decision (Approving/Rejecting AI output).
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Jira / GitHub: "Approved by Human" flag on AI-generated PRs.
Mapping (ISO / AI Act / NIST): EU AI Act Art. 14; ISO 42001 A.6.3

Description: Verify that devices accessing AI have updated OS and Antivirus running.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): CrowdStrike / Microsoft Defender: Central dashboard.

Description: Verify BitLocker/FileVault is active on all devices.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Intune / Kandji: Report "Devices without encryption".

Description: Track % of employees who have signed the "AI Acceptable Use Policy".
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Vanta / Drata: "Policy Compliance %" widget.

Description: Monitor ToS/Privacy Policy changes of key AI vendors (e.g. OpenAI).
Implementation (Automated/Tool): OneTrust / Vanta: Vendor risk updates.

Description: Verify that security logs are actually being saved for the required period (e.g. 6 months).
Implementation (Free/Manual): Check file dates in log folder monthly.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): AWS CloudWatch / SIEM: Retention policy alerts.

Description: Maintain a central log of all suspected AI security incidents.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Jira Service Management: Ticket category "AI Incident".

Description: Collect qualitative feedback from users on AI tools' utility and risks.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Slack/Teams: Automated poll bot.
